supply_chain.dependencies: Dependence on pharmaceutical manufacturers for rebates and drug access; reliance on retail pharmacy networks; concentration with one wholesaler for approximately half of pharmaceutical purchases; dependence on third-party vendors for services and technology
supply_chain.risks: Concentration risk with single wholesaler for ~50% of pharmaceutical purchases; termination or material alteration of relationships with pharmaceutical manufacturers; loss of key pharmacy providers; consolidation of pharmacy chains; supply chain disruptions; reliance on third-party vendors for critical services

regulatory_risks: Patient Protection and Affordable Care Act (ACA) compliance and potential changes
Medicare and Medicaid regulations and reimbursement changes
CMS Star Rating system requirements
Risk Adjustment Data Validation (RADV) audits
Health care fraud and abuse laws including False Claims Act
HIPAA privacy and security requirements
State insurance and HMO regulatory restrictions
Pharmacy benefit manager regulations and transparency requirements
Drug pricing regulations including Inflation Reduction Act
Federal Acquisition Regulations for government contracts
ERISA requirements
State and federal consumer protection laws
Office of Foreign Assets Control sanctions compliance
Anti-money laundering regulations
Corporate practice of medicine laws
Pharmacy network access regulations
Maximum allowable cost (MAC) pricing laws
PCI DSS compliance for payment card data
GDPR and international data protection laws
EU Corporate Sustainability Reporting Directive (CSRD)
California Climate Corporate Data Accountability Act
State data breach notification laws
FTC enforcement on unfair and deceptive practices
AI and machine learning regulations
Pillar Two minimum tax directive (OECD)
State insurance guaranty association assessments
Minimum medical loss ratio (MLR) requirements
Prior authorization and utilization management restrictions
Balance billing and surprise medical bill regulations

sanction_risks: Office of Foreign Assets Control sanctions compliance
Restrictions on operations in sanctioned jurisdictions
Impact of economic or political sanctions on international operations
